utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey Ross ! So , I was checking out the uh , real estate section

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh , it looks like mom and dad house .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh , it even has a tree with a broken limb out front and the uh , the window in the attic is ... Oh my God !

utterances.text: What ? What happened to the window in the attic ? !
